title: achilleanthus ngoyensis
intro: Achilleanthus ngoyensis, also known as the Njoye plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Achilleanthus ngoyensis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight infections. Achilleanthus ngoyensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
